MAPPED_SERVICE_AREA.label: Mapped service area

STATE_LEVEL.label: State-level listing

NATIONAL_OR_FEDERAL.label: National listing
NATIONAL_OR_FEDERAL.message: The provider is listed nationally or federally. Address-specific services still require confirmation.

ADDRESS_CHECK_REQUIRED.label: Address check required

UNKNOWN.label: Coverage unverified
UNKNOWN.message: Coverage confidence is unknown. Confirm availability with the provider.

dossier.title: Your new home
dossier.floodFinePrint: FEMA flood map data, for information only. Verify coverage needs with your insurer or local floodplain office.
dossier.schoolFinePrint: District boundary from NCES data. School assignment isn't guaranteed — confirm enrollment with the district.
dossier.weatherFinePrint: National Weather Service forecast — conditions can change. Check again closer to moving day.
dossier.hazardsFinePrint: FEMA National Risk Index — county-level ratings relative to other U.S. counties, for information only.
dossier.radonFinePrint: EPA radon zone for the county. The EPA recommends testing every home for radon, whatever the zone.
dossier.waterViolationsNone: No health-based violations reported in the past 5 years

dossier.waterFinePrint: EPA Safe Drinking Water Act records. Violations vary in severity — see your utility's annual water quality report.
dossier.airFinePrint: Recent reading from AirNow (EPA) — air quality changes hourly, for information only.
dossier.teaserPitch: Know your new home before you arrive — flood zone, natural-hazard risks, radon, drinking water, air quality, school district, and moving-day weather for your destination, from federal sources like FEMA, the EPA, NCES, and the National Weather Service.

teaser.planReadyGeneric: Your personalized move plan is ready
teaser.moreSteps: +{{count}} more steps in your full plan
teaser.unlockHint: Unlock your full plan: a personalized checklist, deadline countdown, and move tracking.
teaser.dashboardBody: Free keeps your home organized — addresses, providers, bills, and reminders. The full moving plan (personalized checklist, countdown, and tracking) unlocks with Individual.

onboarding.goal_organize: I want to organize my services
onboarding.goal_save: I want to stop paying for things I forgot
onboarding.household_hint: Tap the ones that apply — all optional. We use these only to tailor your checklist.
onboarding.sensitive_hint: These fields are sensitive under US and EU privacy law. They're never required, never shared, and you can turn this off any time in Settings → Privacy.
onboarding.immigration_why: Why we ask: some states (CA, NY, WA) have different DMV document rules for new residents depending on visa status. Skip if it doesn't apply.
onboarding.providers_essentialsHint: Tap one to deselect — you're in control.
onboarding.providers_skipReassure: Not ready? Tap “Add later” — we'll keep these on your move checklist and remind you.
onboarding.moving_title: Do you have a move planned?
onboarding.moving_description: If yes, we'll build a personalized preview of your move — your countdown and top critical steps. If not, you can add one any time from the Moving tab.
onboarding.invitedMemberMovingNote: You've joined a household. A move plan is optional — your household's owner manages the shared move. You can add your own any time.
onboarding.moving_skipped: No problem! You can create a moving plan anytime from the Moving tab.
onboarding.error_namesRequired: First name and last name are required.
onboarding.error_legalRequired: You must accept the Terms of Use and Legal Disclaimer before continuing.
onboarding.error_addressRequired: Street, city, state and ZIP are required.
onboarding.error_stateFormat: State must be a 2-letter code (e.g. TX, NJ).
onboarding.error_addressMissing: No address found. Go back and add an address.
onboarding.error_destinationRequired: Please fill in destination city, state, ZIP, and move date.
onboarding.error_originMissing: No origin address found. Go back and add an address.
onboarding.error_planMissing: Moving plan could not be created.
onboarding.error_serviceIdMissing: Service saved but no service id was returned.
onboarding.error_planCleanup: Failed to clean up moving plan setup.
onboarding.error_completeOnboarding: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.
onboarding.error_onboardingIncomplete: Onboarding is not complete yet. Please review your profile and address information.
onboarding.cta_hint_names: Add your first and last name to continue
onboarding.coach_body_profile: Your household details directly shape your AI move checklist and reminders. The more accurate this is, the better every suggestion fits your home — we never invent data.
onboarding.coach_body_address: We match providers, DMV deadlines, and local services to this exact address. A correct state and ZIP keep every AI suggestion grounded in where you actually live.
onboarding.coach_body_services: Keep only the services you actually use. Clean data here keeps renewal reminders and AI suggestions accurate — and nothing gets forgotten when you move.
onboarding.coach_body_moving: Your move date and destination state drive the deadlines we compute — DMV, voter registration, utilities. Accurate details make your countdown and steps trustworthy.

help.title: Help
help.emptySearchHint: Try a broader search, or open Contact Support if you need direct help.
help.articleGettingStartedExcerpt: Add an address, select services, and keep your move work organized.
help.articleGettingStartedContent: Start by adding your current address. LocateFlow can then show provider options, service records, budgets, and moving tasks tied to that address. Provider actions are tracked manually, so confirm account changes directly with the official provider.
help.articleProvidersExcerpt: Provider listings help you organize services, but they do not update outside accounts.
help.articleProvidersContent: LocateFlow stores provider and service records for your own tracking. Availability can vary by address, and adding a provider does not change your external provider account. Use the provider website or phone number to confirm any real account or address update.
help.articleMovingExcerpt: Create a move plan to see address, service, and checklist work in one place.
help.articleMovingContent: A moving plan connects your origin address, destination, date, services, and checklist tasks. Completing a task updates LocateFlow only unless you separately finish the action with the provider or agency.
help.faqDataSyncQuestion: Will web and mobile show the same data?
help.faqDataSyncAnswer: Yes. Web and mobile use the same account APIs, so addresses, services, moving plans, tickets, and notifications sync when you sign in with the same user.
help.faqProviderQuestion: Does adding a provider update my account?
help.faqProviderAnswer: No. Adding a provider creates a LocateFlow tracking record only. Confirm address changes, cancellations, transfers, and billing updates with the official provider.
help.faqHelpQuestion: Why might help content not load?
help.faqHelpAnswer: Help content normally loads from LocateFlow. If the network or server is unavailable, the app shows built-in help so you can still open this screen.
